title: cupania latifolia
intro: Cupania latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved Cupania, is a plant species native to tropical regions, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and roots, which are rich in tannins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cupania latifolia include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
